sections.paragraph: συϰοφαντέω [συϰοφάντης (σῦκον, φαίνω) ‘informer exposing pers. to legal proceedings’ (association with illegal export of figs from Greece is one of numerous endeavors to determine origin of συϰοφάντης)] ‘misuse one’s authority for personal gain’, extort Lk 3:14 (intimidation may be implied here); 19:8.
